title: Test Layers, Service Containers, Coverage, and Changed-Case Evidence · Independent Delivery Trial
summary: An independent delivery team receives an unfamiliar repository, event, runner, and trust constraint and must transfer test layers, service containers, coverage, and changed-case evidence into a new layered test and service evidence plan. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of layered test and service evidence plan with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost.
Configure service image identity, ports, health, credentials, network scope, per-job state, migrations, fixtures, and deterministic teardown.
Shard tests without duplicate or missing cases and detect order, time, locale, seed, port, and shared-state dependence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Test Layer Risk Selection
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab suite mocks every boundary, starts an unready database, shares state across 5 shards, retries flakes, and celebrates coverage while a changed case fails. Design risk-layered, isolated, diagnostic evidence.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Test Layer Risk Selection.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for allocate unit, component, integration, contract, end-to-end, accessibility, security, and smoke tests from failure risk and feedback cost. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Test Layer Risk Selection, keep Ci Test Layer Risk Selection connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Ci Test Layer Risk Selection condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: GitHub Actions Concepts, Workflow Syntax, Contexts, Events, and Runners — Controls workflow execution, YAML, expressions, contexts, events, jobs, matrices, outputs, artifacts, caches, concurrency, reuse, runners, environments, and limits.

hints: For Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Test Layer Risk Selection, name the event, revision, actor, permission, runner, dependency, artifact, environment, deployment, and recovery boundary, Ci Test Layer Risk Selection precondition, or invariant that must hold.

For Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Test Layer Risk Selection, challenge the documented misconception with workflow, run, artifact, policy, fault, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: More end-to-end tests always produce more confidence than lower-level tests.

options.text: More end-to-end tests always produce more confidence than lower-level tests. That claim fails the commit to the mission model evidence boundary for Ci Test Layer Risk Selection.

For commit to the mission model, copy one familiar workflow, omit event and revision identity, permissions, runner, immutable artifact, failure, rollback, and disposable delivery-environment transfer checks, then accept a green run as production proof. This does not satisfy Ci Test Layer Risk Selection for layered test and service evidence plan.
State the Ci Test Layer Risk Selection preconditions, preserve earlier contracts, and name the trace or changed-input result that will decide success.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy-4eg0ie". Tailor its test-evidence.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy into observable performance evidence. For Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy, keep Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy-4eg0ie
  - competency: ci-test-report-quarantine-policy
    artifact: test-evidence.yaml
    decision: test report quarantine policy
    environment: multi-platform Buildx release to a non-production registry
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: queue duration critical path failure class recovery and cost evidence
    case-key: 4eg0ie
    change: |
      layers: [unit, component, integration, contract, e2e, accessibility, security]
      service-image: postgres@sha256:verified
      service-health: readiness-query
      state: per-job-fixture
      shard-proof: complete-and-disjoint
      coverage: branch-changed-line-and-mutation
      retry: disabled-by-default
      reports: immutable-junit-trace-screenshot
    verify: run changed-case tests with fresh service state deterministic seeds report reconciliation and failure preservation
    failure: Reject coverage percentage as assertion quality, start as readiness, shared mutable fixtures, or retry-until-green.
    repair: Select layers by risk, wait for service behavior, isolate state, prove shards, preserve reports, and repair flakes causally.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

content.title: Evidence is more than syntax
content.text: The Ci Test Report Quarantine Policy structural check is only one gate. layered test and service evidence plan must also survive the stated changed case and causal explanation.
